subject: Re:
body:
2008/6/1 J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>:

> glad to hear your studies are going well, i continue to "ping" you , to
> remding you that there is a larger world out there,, don't take the easy
> route


Hey,

I was very surprised to receive u're phone call...I guess You heard that in
my voice, I was blocked for a minute.

I know the huge possibilities that I have, but in the same time I feel that
the world is actually to big (large) for me.. I'm quite scared to strat on
my own something, I always had support from the ones I cared for, and I
always have been told what to do, even though I made my decisions on my own
:)!

Don't take the easy route...well in this moment I don't see any easy
route..everything sound very complicated but I guess with  time everything
will sound less complicated.

I apreciate the fact that you are giving me some advices, I'm still trying
to figure out excactlly what I really want to do!

About Paris and fashion week there I'm still thinking about it, I don't want
to risk spending 2 weeks there (time when I could study) doing castings and
not earning enough money... I'll make my decision soon.
I received an email from one of you're assistents asking me the  my home
adress. What do you intend to send me? I'm very curious...

Best thoughts,
Andra Stroe
body_html:
2008/6/1 J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>:
glad to hear your studies are going well, i continue to "ping" you , to remding you that there is a larger world out there,, don't take the easy route

Hey,

I was very surprised to receive u're phone call...I guess You heard that in my voice, I was blocked for a minute.

I know the huge possibilities that I have, but in the same time I feel that the world is actually to big (large) for me.. I'm quite scared to strat on my own something, I always had support from the ones I cared for, and I always have been told what to do, even though I made my decisions on my own :)!

Don't take the easy route...well in this moment I don't see any easy route..everything sound very complicated but I guess with  time everything will sound less complicated.

I apreciate the fact that you are giving me some advices, I'm still trying to figure out excactlly what I really want to do!

About Paris and fashion week there I'm still thinking about it, I don't want to risk spending 2 weeks there (time when I could study) doing castings and not earning enough money... I'll make my decision soon.
I received an email from one of you're assistents asking me the  my home adress. What do you intend to send me? I'm very curious...

Best thoughts,
Andra Stroe
